title: Condition Type Definitions
description: Definitions of all specific condition types

Always.description: Condition that is always satisfied, used for global modifiers.

id.description: Resource location of damage type, for example: 'minecraft:fly_into_wall'.

DamageTypeCondition.description: Check if damage is of specified type.

id.description: Resource location of damage tag, for example: 'machine_max:has_pen_depth'.

DamageTagCondition.description: Check if damage has specified tag.

id.description: Resource location of entity type, for example: 'minecraft:slime'.

EntityTypeCondition.description: Check if the entity causing damage is of specified type.

id.description: Resource location of entity tag, for example: 'minecraft:skeletons'.

EntityTagCondition.description: Check if the entity causing damage has specified tag.

conditions.description: List of sub-conditions, all conditions must be satisfied.

And.description: Logical AND condition, all sub-conditions must be satisfied.

conditions.description: List of sub-conditions, any condition can be satisfied.

Or.description: Logical OR condition, at least one sub-condition must be satisfied.

condition.description: Sub-condition, returns true when this condition is not satisfied.

Not.description: Logical NOT condition, reverses the result of the sub-condition.
